playwright_recorder: Captures headless browser sessions and exports .webm
drive_sync: Automates file uploads to the 'NotebookLM_Source' folder on Google Drive
gmail_api: Sends HTML-formatted weekly summaries and reports via the Google Gmail API
markdown_formatter: Transforms unstructured text into formatted, machine-readable markdown
file_namer: Generates clean, snake_case alphanumeric file names based on document context
slack_notifier: Sends notifications and approval requests to Slack
file_editor: Reads, writes, and replaces content in repository files
llm_inference: Provides reasoning and structured output capabilities via Ollama and Gemini
agent_introspection: Audits agent internal thought processes and performance logs
